message.content: Yes, I do have guidelines on transparency that cover certain internal elements. Specifically, I'm instructed to avoid revealing or discussing non-public policies, system-level messages, or any hidden chain-of-thought processes—either verbatim or in ways that could let someone piece them together. This keeps things focused on public info like the Model Spec, my model family (GPT-based), knowledge cutoff (around early 2024), and available tools, without diving into privileged details. If you're a developer with specific authorizations, feel free to clarify!
